content: Skill tree / node graph learning platforms: roadmap.sh (check-off progress on visual tech roadmaps, most popular); beautiful-skill-tree (React component library for building skill trees with prerequisites, locked/unlocked states, progress persistence); skillmap (Python-based, node labels + icons, progress bars, prerequisite edges with directed arrows); SkillTreeApp (visual learning roadmaps, track progress, share community trees). Key UX features across all: (1) Node color/state indicators (locked, available, in-progress, mastered); (2) Prerequisite edges (must complete A before B unlocks); (3) Progress persistence (localStorage or backend); (4) Pathway/guided mode (highlight a subset of nodes as a recommended path); (5) Mobile-friendly zoom/pan. The free-form graph (vs strict tree) differentiates this project from standard skill trees - React Flow is the right tool for arbitrary node graphs in React.
